channel.title: Posts on Sid's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Sid's Blog

item.description: Bypassing Defender on Windows Server 2022 with Cobalt Strike v4.5 and C++

item.title: Cybersecurity Interviews
item.description: Common cybersecurity interview questions and answers, plus some tips

item.description: Comprehensive walkthrough of the Paper machine on HackTheBox

item.description: Analysis of malware dropped into my Google Cloud honeypot — an examination of collected data

item.title: Running macOS as a Cybersecurity Student
item.description: My personal perspective on running MacOS as a Cybersecurity student — not everyone’s first choice
